title: Have a warning pop up when before clicking on delete for a non connected board
excerpt:
Hello, 
The feature request is : 
Add a popup warning when clicking on delete on a non connected boards. 
This could be also approved by permissions depending on the users. 
Thanks

posts.author: delia (Délia Figueira)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello,

The feature request is :
Add a popup warning when clicking on delete on a non connected boards.
This could be also approved by permissions depending on the users.
Thanks

Actual situation : this pop up exists only for boards connected

See discussion : Add a pop-up warning to prevent from deleting a board accidentally
